references.caption:
🛌 "낮잠도 잘못 자면 독이다"
아무렇게나 자는 낮잠이 오히려 몸을 망친다고요? 😱
9가지 위험한 낮잠 습관, 지금 바로 확인해보세요 👆
references.style_notes:
**Content Type:** Health information card - Sleep/Nap safety guide
**Layout:** Vertical video format (640x1136), numbered list presentation (9 items mentioned in caption)
**Visual Style:** Video thumbnail showing illustrated health information content
**Topic:** Dangerous nap habits - preventive health education
**Text Style:** Korean text with emoji emphasis (🛌 😱 👆)
**Educational Value:** Warning-based educational content about sleep health
**Format:** Mobile-first vertical video (Reels/Clips)
**Structure:** Numbered list format for easy consumption

**Filter Assessment:**
✅ COLLECT - Educational health content with structured information (9-point list)
✅ Topic aligns with health knowledge dissemination  
✅ Matches target style: Illustrated health cards with numbered information
✅ Not commercial or exercise demonstration content

**Style Analysis:**
- **Hook Strategy:** Provocative statement + warning emoji
- **Content Promise:** Clear value (9 specific tips)
- **CTA:** Direct action prompt ("지금 바로 확인해보세요 👆")
- **Hashtag Strategy:** Simple, relevant (#낮잠 #건강정보 #건강꿀팁)
